title: Lorraine Netro awarded Glen Davis Conservation Prize
summary: On behalf of the staff and board of Alaska Wilderness League, I was thrilled last week to congratulate our board member Lorraine Netro on winning the Glen Davis Conservation Leadership Prize. The prize has been a part of a five-year joint project between the World Wildlife Fund (WWF) of Canada and t...

title: Still Time to Respond to USDA’s National Agricultural Classification Survey
summary: If you missed the deadline to respond to USDA’s National Agricultural Classification Survey (NACS), it is not too late. A second survey reminder is coming soon and responding online is easier than ever before. The survey, one of the most important steps in determining who should receive a 2022 Censu...
